corrections.text: The article attributes the per-registry breakdown of '21 npm packages, 7 PyPI packages, and 6 Crates.io packages' to both GBHackers on Security and CybersecurityNews. GBHackers on Security actually reports 17 npm packages and 8 PyPI packages (with the same 6 for Crates.io and 34 total). The 21/7/6 breakdown is confirmed by CyberPress and CryptoTimes, both of which cite Socket's original research. The total count of 34 packages and 384+ versions is consistent across all sources.
